items.briefing:
Global cyberattacks jumped 17% in June compared to last year, according to Check Point, meaning Australian organisations are operating in an increasingly hostile environment. Microsoft has also patched a zero-day vulnerability called RoguePlanet, so staff should ensure their Microsoft software is up to date. Separately, researchers are warning that AI tools — including the newly launched ChatGPT Work now available in Australia — can introduce new security risks if not properly managed by organisations.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation uses any AI tools, check with your IT team that approved, work-safe versions are being used rather than personal accounts.

featured.title: ACSC warns of large-scale campaign exploiting CMS vulnerabilities in Australia
featured.quote: ACSC alerts Australian organizations to large-scale CMS vulnerability exploitation campaign affecting the country.
